# tensor-ad-oracles Docs

`tensor-ad-oracles` publishes mathematical AD notes and a machine-readable
oracle database as parallel artifacts.

Use this site for the human-facing note corpus:

- [Math Notes](./math/index.md)
- [Math Registry Reference](./math-registry.md)

The raw registry JSON is also published as
[`math/registry.json`](./math/registry.json).
